arts.ttl: Guardiola fears for summer transfers if Manchester City miss out on top five
arts.sum: Manager believes targets may prefer to move elsewhere ‘I’m sure the players look at ones in Champions League’ Pep Guardiola fears Manchester City could miss out on summer transfer targets if they fail to qualify for the Champions League. After winning the last four Premier League titles during an unprecedented spell of domestic dominance, the goal this season is to earn a place back at European football’s top table. City sit fifth having recovered from an awful end to 2024, but they have work to do in the fight for a Champions League spot that may have a bearing on who they can attract this summer.
